      -------------------------------------------------------------------
                        STM32CubeProgrammer v2.22.0
      -------------------------------------------------------------------

SWV started on all ports, frequency 80 MHz

ITM channel 0: app: state=running
ITM channel 1: net: rx_packet len=128
ITM channel 0: app: tick
ITM channel 2: trace: enter ISR
ITM channel 1: net: tx_packet len=64
ITM channel 0: app: tock
